servinfosub.title: DTC Detecting Condition and Trouble Area

ptxt.emph: B1021: Front Air Bag Deployment Record

entry.ptxt: Deployment of front air bag has been recorded in SDM.
If this DTC has been recorded even though air bag or pretensioner has not been deployed

item.ptxt: Driver and/or Passenger air bag (inflator) module
Driver and/or Passenger seat belt pretensioner

ptxt.emph: B1024: Side Air Bag Deployment Record (Driver Side)

entry.ptxt: Deployment of driver-side side-air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.

ptxt.emph: B1025: Side Air Bag Deployment Record (Passenger Side)

entry.ptxt: Deployment of passenger-side side-air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.

ptxt.emph: B1026: Seat Belt Pretensioner Activation Record

entry.ptxt: Activation of seat belt pretensioner has been recorded in SDM.

ptxt.emph: B1028: Curtain Air Bag Deployment Record (Driver Side)

entry.ptxt: Deployment of driver-side curtain air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.

ptxt.emph: B1029: Curtain Air Bag Deployment Record (Passenger Side)

entry.ptxt: Deployment of passenger-side curtain air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.

ptxt.emph: B1222: Knee Air Bag Deployment Record (Driver Side)

entry.ptxt: Deployment of knee air bag (inflator) module has been recorded in SDM.

attention3.ptxt: If DTC B1021, B1024, B1025, B1026, B1028, B1029 or DTC B1222 is stored in SDM, it is not possible to clear DTC.

testgroup.question: Was “Air Bag Diagnostic System Check” performed?

action.ptxt: Go to Air Bag Diagnostic System Check .

attention3.ptxt: Upon completion of inspection and repair work, perform the following items.

item.ptxt: Reconnect all air bag system components and ensure all components are properly mounted.
Repeat Air Bag Diagnostic System Check to confirm that the trouble has been corrected.
